name: QA 301
description:
PCP QA Test No. 301

Stop pmcd and check no pmdas are still running.



Copyright (c) 1995-2002 Silicon Graphics, Inc.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform centos6 reproduce

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 301.out.bad)
1a2
> [Thu Aug 20 17:16:59] pmcd(100381) Error: Failed to create avahi client: Daemon not running
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 97d404ba7f88 -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 97d404ba7f88 -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 97d404ba7f88 -f simple.numfetch
